rows.label: qev027001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Whoa there, passing BLADE-san!
Meeting here must be fate, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0002
rows.name: Just stop and listen to what I have to say, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Even if you say no, I'm going to start talking anyway, jan.
Because this is a serious problem for us, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0004
rows.name:
To put it quickly, the point is that the world has become
a truly dangerous place lately, jan, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Recently, it's gone too far, jan!
It's gotten to the point where we can't even do maintenance outside in peace, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0006
rows.name: And even as I say this............ [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0007
rows.name: Look, look up there, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0008
rows.name:
If we do our work in conspicuous places like this,
we get shot at out of nowhere, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0009
rows.name:
This makes 14 victims so far, jan.
That's a number we can't just ignore, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0010
rows.name:
But we have a pretty good idea of who the culprit is, jan.
As you might have guessed, it has to be the work of the Growth, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Those guys should have been completely driven out from around here,
but there are still stragglers left, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0012
rows.name: I'm sure it's harassment against the Ma-non who wouldn't become their subordinates, and... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0013
rows.name:
They must be carrying out these meaningless attacks to vent their frustration
over being no match for armed Earthlings, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0014
rows.name: It's unforgivable, jan! I'm furious, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you understand how I feel,
I want you to be my ally, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0016
rows.name: I want you to find those remaining Growth attackers and defeat them, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the scale of the enemy forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_SEL0021
rows.name: Doubt whether it is truly the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hmm. The enemy's scale... That's a fair question,
but a difficult one to answer, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0018
rows.name: But it's certain that it's not a large force, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0019
rows.name:
If it were a large force, they wouldn't sneak around shooting at us,
they'd just surge in all at once, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0020
rows.name:
The fact that they go out of their way to snipe us
is proof that the enemy's military strength doesn't have much leeway, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Why, jan!
Why do you doubt what I'm saying, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0022
rows.name:
Thanks to you Earthlings,
this area is already completely peaceful, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0023
rows.name:
To pull off such malicious harassment at this stage...
It's unthinkable that it could be anyone but the Growth, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Stop doubting me
and cheerfully cooperate with me, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0025
rows.name:
So with that said...
I want you to start by investigating to find the enemy's whereabouts right away, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0026
rows.name:
But as things are now, we don't know the direction they shot from, jan.
We really should have been observing properly, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0027
rows.name: Ah, if that's what you need... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0028
rows.name:
Gwaaah!?
Don't just suddenly butt into the conversation, jan!
Or rather, you were alive, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0029
rows.name:
Of course I am, dawayo.
I got heavily injured, but as you can see, I'm alive, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0030
rows.name:
I was suddenly shot,
and my guts are boiling with rage, dawayo!
I want you to go and beat them up, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0031
rows.name: Do you remember the direction you were attacked from, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0032
rows.name: It seems I was shot from behind, around my right hip, so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0033
rows.name: The enemy is definitely in the northern direction, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0034
rows.name:
There was a fair amount of impact,
but I didn't get burned to a crisp or anything, so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Even considering it was a precision shot with the beam's convergence width narrowed to the limit,
the attack must have come from quite far away, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0036
rows.name:
Judging from the distance and direction...
The enemy is likely around the Primordial Wilderness, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Huff, puff.
I talked too much all of a sudden, dawayo.
I don't have enough blood, and I'm feeling dizzy, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0038
rows.name:
We know the gist of the enemy now,
so you should leave the rest to us and rest, jan.
Eat lots of foods that build blood, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0039
rows.name:
Don't worry, by the time you've eaten, slept, and gotten better,
everything will be settled, jan!
Trust in the BLADE I've hired, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0040
rows.name:
So with that, I'm counting on you, jan!
I want you to start investigating in the northern direction from here, in the Primordial Wilderness, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0041
rows.name: Oh? Have you decided to listen to Bihabba's request, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0042
rows.name:
I want you to investigate the enemy shooting at us from the northern direction,
in the Primordial Wilderness, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0043
rows.name:
You're already involved this much, so you might as well see it through, jan!
Leaving things half-finished is no good, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0044
rows.name: If you accept the investigation, Heradot will be happy in the afterlife too, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0045
rows.name: Even though Heradot is just receiving treatment right now and isn't actually dead, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0046
rows.name: Now, commence the investigation in the Primordial Wilderness, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0047
rows.name: It truly is a dangerous world, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0048
rows.name: We Ma-non just want to live leisurely and freely, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027001_MSG0049
rows.name: We don't want anyone interfering with our way of life, jan! [ST:wait ]
